description: Exceptionally spacious 3-bedroom plus family room townhouse, quietly located near No. 2 Road and Granville Avenue. This bright corner unit, proudly maintained by its owner, has been tastefully updated with a renovated kitchen, updated flooring, and renovated bedroom and bathrooms. Features include central A/C air conditioning throughout, a gas fireplace, generous living areas, excellent natural light, and a double side-by-side garage. An ideal family home offering comfort, functionality, and long-term value in a highly convenient location. Steps to Thompson Community Centre and park, Burnett High School, and Blair Elementary. Minutes to Minoru Park and Aquatic Centre, Richmond Centre, and the Richmond Olympic Oval.
